features: 3 PIECE HAIR BLEACH KIT: This essential 3 piece hair styling appliances set consists of 1x Hair Dye Mixing Bowl, 1x Hair Dye Brush and 1x Peroxide Measuring Tube, everything you need to start mixing permanent hair dye & toner.
WASHABLE & DURABLE MATERIALS: The hair dye kit is manufactured from a premium black plastic that is washable, so you can reuse the hair highlighting tool kit set over & over again.

PROFESSIONAL HAIR DYE TOOL SET: The hair dying brush and bowl set is specially designed for colouring & dyeing hair and thanks to its premium aesthetically appealing construction, the hair highlighting kit will add a sense of professionalism to your salon.

VERSATILE HAIR ACCESSORIES: This versatile hair dye set is perfect for salons, freelance hairdressers or as a hair care gift set for those who want to try it themselves at the comfort of their own home.

HAIR TOOLS: Established in 1996, Hair Tools Limited are one the UK’s leading manufacturers and distributors of professional hairdressing & beauty products. Experience the difference with Hair Tools, a leading brand in professional hairdressing equipment & accessories. Explore our range of products and take your salon and home styling to the next level.
description: Hair Tools 3Pcs Hair Colouring Set WHAT YOU GET: 1x Hair Dye Mixing Bowl 1x Hair Dye Brush 1x Peroxide Measuring Tube MATERIALS: Manufactured from washable plastic, which can be used a countless number of times The hair colouring brush has high quality bristles to ensure all hairs get treatment MISCELLANEOUS: Colour: Black for an aesthetically pleasing and professional appeal The hair brush and bowl set is a 3-piece kit made up of 1x hair dye mixing bowl, 1x hair dye brush and 1x peroxide measuring tube The black dye kit is the perfect mixing bowl set for any professional hair salon, freelance hairstylist or anyone looking to style their hair at home This hair dying kit is designed for regular use thanks to its construction, which it makes it completely reusable Specially designed brush makes it easy for colouring all types of hair, including straight, curly, long & short This premium 3 piece hair dyeing set has a practical design that is easy to use, so you can neatly & professionally carry out your work Explore what else Hair Tools has to offer and take your salon and home styling to the next level
